name: Nancy's Fabulous Muffaletta Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped green olives stuffed with pimientos
1/2 cup Roasted sweet red peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. The roasted red peppers are Italian-style, available at many Italian delis.
2. When ready for a sandwich the next day, assemble as follows:
- Cut one loaf of fresh Italian bread in half to make a monster sandwich or two individual hero sandwiches (grinders).
- Scoop out a little from each side of the open loaf.
- Drizzle olive oil and juice from the olive salad on both sides generously.
- On the bottom slice, place salami, olive salad, provolone, mild cheese, and mortadella.
- Top with the other half loaf.
3. Slice into wedges or enjoy the individual loaves.
